text.message: I can help with road oj
blue ab to take ur road

i wont take road back when orange takes it tho
he seems to not want it
ofc he wants, just doing city first
u dont seem to get a lot
I mean look at the board
look at the board and rob me
how is that a reason to rob me lol
and ur also refusing to hit orange so im sure orange is losing right
I hit the nine and robbed from blue
cause he connects for the win probabuly
or how is it that somehow, despite being behind you, it makes sense for you to hit me over orange, but not the other way around
just play and take the loss as it is: you played bad
and not hitting u out of spite like u are to me
